title: Introducing Cursor for iOS
summary: Cursor released an iOS app enabling developers to build using always-on cloud agents or to remotely control agents running on their computer. The app extends Cursor's AI-assisted development capabilities to mobile platforms.
writeup: Cursor introduces an iOS app that brings its AI-assisted development workflow to mobile. The app supports two modes: building with always-on cloud agents, and remotely controlling agents running on a developer's own computer. This extends agent orchestration beyond the desktop, allowing development tasks to continue from a phone.
